title: Against the Grain
lyrics: Are we just friends or are we enemies, are we friends or are we turning into one, it's so obvious this can happen just for a minute. To be wanted men are meant for brush the neat and for abstract thoughts that you fake it in, know it's no commune and I thought you would hit my belief. Purposefully. Come and show me how to be friends and not enemies. Are we friends or are we friends turning into enemies enemies, enemies with abilities enemies tell me what you see, capitalists you ride, capitalists you try, I'm a local guy and I'm a motherfuckin' liar. Enemies, enemies with abilities, enemies with abilities, enemies with abilities, give me something of yours or mine, even now you know someone's a liar. Are we friends or are we friends turning into enemies enemies, enemies with abilities enemies, enemies with abilities, enemies with abilities, enemies with abilities, enemies with abilities, Notены, feminitems, not buildin' by and y'all. Enemies, enemies with abilities, enemies with abilities, what sorta shit y'all talkin' about for these, for these, law for these, law for these, law for these enemies what is your fuckin' name name of this. You get it thoe, got it thoe, you got the MATRIX this hell speculate, slow, shot down and shot up and killed and you know it's over.
